title: AppSync (Managed GraphQL)
description: Implement AppSync (Managed GraphQL) for building robust APIs. Architect real-time subscriptions and offline data synchronization using AppSync resolvers integrated with backends like DynamoDB or Lambda.
objectives: Implement AppSync (Managed GraphQL) for building robust APIs.
Architect real-time subscriptions and offline data synchronization using AppSync resolvers integrated with backends like DynamoDB or Lambda.
